calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2014 Off Calendar

Req. For Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Defualt Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Andrew R. Neilson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, EDWIN GARCIA.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) DON SANTOS and MAKE READY MAINTENANCE, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Edwin Garcia sworn and examined on hiw own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $42,785.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $6,536.68
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $944.30
Total Judgment in the amount of $50,265.98
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Continued To Oct-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Continued To Jun-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
